features.evidence: The CPU uses 20 to 40 watts when gaming in turbo mode.-300HZ Screen is SUPER smooth on high fps games, and the colors are also more accurate than lower SRGB screens-Battery last a long time (5hours+) if in ECO mode and just browsing and watching movies/music. Says the graphics are great, no lag and can smoothly play her games which her previous laptop could not handle.

The CPU uses 20 to 40 watts when gaming in turbo mode.-300HZ Screen is SUPER smooth on high fps games, and the colors are also more accurate than lower SRGB screens-Battery last a long time (5hours+) if in ECO mode and just browsing and watching movies/music. My Pros: I have had no issues with overheating thus far, I'll run further battery tests and provide an update needs be.
For the price the specs are great. It was a great value (I got it on sale?).

The display is smooth, 300 HZ so that's to be expected. The CPU uses 20 to 40 watts when gaming in turbo mode.-300HZ Screen is SUPER smooth on high fps games, and the colors are also more accurate than lower SRGB screens-Battery last a long time (5hours+) if in ECO mode and just browsing and watching movies/music.

custom fan curves using armory crate software will help with that. clicks are soft and acceptable.-1 Year ASUS accidental damage Warranty,-240 Watt Charger gets super hot when gaming, maybe consider some cooling fan blow on charger for charger longevity.-All in all it is a great gaming laptop as it plays all the games I like high settings both 1080p and 1440p.

The keyboard backlight is a little weak even at maximum , the FKEYS especially, that aside for the cost I believe it to be a good acquisition for school/Work and light gaming. When gaming and in turbo mode (Mux switch on) the GPU/CPU will chow full battery within 2 hours.-Backlit RGB keyboard is nice, can switch between many lighting setting and colors, and 3 brightness levels.-Wifi surprisingly sucks when connecting to access points far away(10metes +) compared to my office Dell laptop.
custom fan curves using armory crate software will help with that.
100+mbs.-RAM 2x 8Gig 4800Mhz ram, so its dual channel which really gives a boost in gaming performance.-Touchpad is smooth/accurate and does exactly what it should.
The machine is sturdy , the webcam is average.
Num pad included and the trackpad is responsive.
